content: Explore /app/moonlight current state and check git status
Run yarn test to identify all failing tests
Fix backend build errors (paths, WebSocket, DTOs, Promise)
Fix desktop build errors (types.ts missing, vite-env, tsconfig)
Verify yarn build passes for backend + desktop
Run smoke test to ensure system integrity
Quick scan of 5 newly uploaded docs (deltas only)
Report status to user and await next direction
